EmptyGroupDescription: There are no rooms here. Try adding a room or remove this group.
RemoveGroupConfirmation: You are about to delete group of rooms. Are you sure you want to proceed?
RemoveGroupInfo: The rooms included in group will be displayed in the All Rooms section.
RoomGroupingDescription: Easily navigate your {{productName}} with the new room grouping option. Organize rooms by specific features to quickly find what you need. You can enable room grouping now or anytime later in your profile settings.
RoomGroupsDescription: You can group rooms into folders and easily switch between them. By disabling grouping, you can re-enable it in the profile settings.
